lastDescription: Initial MENA job-search command center PWA prototype: Arabic-first RTL mobile UI, 5-tab bottom nav (البحث/الوظائف/الإعدادات/الحساب/النتيجة), multi-select + bulk-move, sources + فحص تلقائي with Rust background worker, JSON-LD/HTML live connectors (WUZZUF, Bayt, Khamsat, generic), approved-API guard for LinkedIn/Indeed, 52-test green cargo test --lib
